---
title: "Persona 4 Team Management"
author: 
  - name: "Ángel Álamo"
format: 
  html:
    include-after-body:
      - file: "script.html"
    css: "styles.css"
editor: visual
execute: 
  echo: false
---

This page is dedicated to ease the management of your Personas team in the game Persona 4. In order to it, it is shown the following properties in different tables: Strengths and Weaknesses, Attacks and Defenses.


## Management

The size of the table is $12$, since the game only allows $12$ Personas at a time. However, you can add $3$ more Personas separately to compare the data or even replace it with one Persona of the table.

```{=html}
<div class="divPersonaSelectTable">
  <div>
    <input list="optsPersonaSelectTable" id="PersonaSelectTable" placeholder="Persona">
    <datalist id="optsPersonaSelectTable">
      
    </datalist>
  </div>
  
  <div>
    <button id="buttonAddPersonaSelectTable"> Add </button>
  </div>

  <div>
    <button id="ButtonRemovePersonaSelectTable"> Remove </button>
  </div>

</div>
```



::: {.panel-tabset}
## Strengths and Weaknesses

```{=html}

<table border="1" id="tableStr&Wk" class="clstableStr&Wk">
  <thead>
    <tr>    <!-- Fila -->
      <th>Persona</th>    <!-- Encabezado -->
      <th>Arcana</th>
      <th>Phys</th>
      <th>Fire</th>
      <th>Ice</th>
      <th>Elec</th>
      <th>Wind</th>
      <th>Light</th>
      <th>Dark</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody id="ttableStr&Wk" class="clsttableStr&Wk">

  </tbody>
</table>
```


## Attacks

```{=html}

<table border="1" id="tableAt" class="clstableAt">
  <thead>
    <tr>    <!-- Fila -->
      <th>Persona</th>    <!-- Encabezado -->
      <th>Arcana</th>
      <th>Phys</th>
      <th>Fire</th>
      <th>Ice</th>
      <th>Elec</th>
      <th>Wind</th>
      <th>Light</th>
      <th>Dark</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody id="ttableAt" class="clsttableAt">

  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Defenses

```{=html}

<table border="1" id="tableDef" class="clstableAt">
  <thead>
    <tr>    <!-- Fila -->
      <th>Persona</th>    <!-- Encabezado -->
      <th>Arcana</th>
      <th>Def Up</th>
      <th>Attack Up</th>
      <th>Hit/Evasion Up</th>
      <th>Charge Up</th>
      <th>Def Down</th>
      <th>Attack Down</th>
      <th>Hit/Evasion Down</th>
      
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody id="ttableDef" class="clsttableDef">
  
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::


## Compendium
